reviews.review_description: Decent game but I can't stand to play it because I CAN'T SHUT THAT STUPID MUSIC OFF!! There should always be an option to shut music off in every game. People's tastes are not at all the same & I for one can't stand 99% of any games music. Another one ruined for me..😪
Well worth the money. This is one of those hidden gems that doesn't get the credit its deserved, I've really enjoyed playing it and will continue to do so.

GREAT GAME  idea just needs a few tweaks.
My main gripe is the sound, a basic arcade game like this needs bells & whistles to keep u shooting,research slotmachine noises. The basic gun sounds horrible and when the bullets hit the enemy they need to make a sound like I just connected and blew it the F up. I can't stress enuff how your starting gun needs to sound AMAZing, you got a gatling gun that sounds like a 99c gun. Also the lady telling u the rockets are ready is way louder then everything else. Also I don't like the lock on. It makes the game to easy and there is no gratification, feels like my actuall aiming skills doesn't matter much. A little more time in the oven and this can be a true gem.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for playing our game and for your support. We have received your suggestions, especially regarding audio quality and targeting lock. Thank you for your feedback.

Update: The crosshair will no longer auto-aim

reviews.review_description:
Isn’t a blockbuster, but worth it's price.
The game itself is actually fun,a rogue-lite mech bullet hell wave shooter. 
Weaving through bullet storms turned out to be more thrilling than expected
